Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 python -c "
import yt_dlp
url = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DuqC071teZA'
opts = {'skip_download': True, 'writesubtitles': True, 'writeautomaticsub': True, 'quiet': True}
with yt_dlp.YoutubeDL\(opts\) as ydl:
    info = ydl.extract_info\(url, download=False\)
auto = list\(info.get\('automatic_captions', {}\).keys\(\)\)
print\('auto langs:', auto\)
" 2>&1)
